students.name: Youssef Ahmed Sabry
students.role: Newspaper Editor & The CSE Science rep of Secondary
students.quote: working on the school magazine is such an honour for me, I will gladly try to make this magazine the best there ever was in all of futures' schools

students.name: Ahmed Alaadin Hassan Darmelli
students.quote: You fell down so what? Get back up. For it is our destiny to rise, and in that there's no doubt

students.name: Yassin Ahmed Sabry
students.quote: I suppose leadership at one time meant muscles, but today it means getting along with people.
